open.title: Openserve outage | Western Cape and Eastern Cape
open.description: Openserve has informed us of a network outage affecting Western Cape and Eastern Cape, affected clients will experience high latency, slow speeds and packet loss. Openserve engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.
